tokens.title: API Tokens
tokens.created: Token created — copy it now, it won't be shown again.

empty.title: No personal tokens
empty.description: Create one to authenticate from CI scripts or the listener.

dates.title: Dates & timezone
dates.timezoneHint: All dates in the UI render in this timezone.
dates.showRelativeHint: e.g. “2 hours ago”; hover shows the absolute timestamp.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.variantHint: Applied when the resolved mode is dark (Dark, or System on a dark OS).

navy.label: Navy
navy.description: Mid-tone slate-blue surfaces. Soft contrast, blue cast.

dim.label: Dim
dim.description: GitHub-style mid-greys. Low contrast, easy on the eyes.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.smtpDisabledWarning: SMTP is not configured. Emails will not be sent regardless of your preferences here.

execution_assigned.title: Execution assigned to you
execution_assigned.description: When someone assigns you to a test execution.

execution_finished.title: Execution finished
execution_finished.description: When a run you created or are assigned to completes.

execution_failed.title: Execution had failed tests
execution_failed.description: When a completed run had at least one failed test.

password.title: Change password
password.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
